meta.title: Vivaldi — The Four Seasons: Spring / La primavera, Movement 2 (Largo)
meta.author: Antonio Vivaldi; physical-model transcription by Codex
meta.description: 沉睡牧羊人；保留長線條與樂句尾端呼吸。
meta.use_case: AI physical-model composition / accessible score rendering

source.attribution: Mutopia Project score maintained by smailliw; source based on Performers' Facsimiles. Derived transcription shares alike.
source.editorial_note: Pitch, onset, note-off, rests, repeats, track roles, tempo and meter come from the source MIDI. Dynamics and physical bow-gap treatment are TsukiSynth interpretation data.

timing_policy.source_timing: MIDI note-on/note-off converted through tempo map
timing_policy.duration_compensation: event.duration = intended sounding duration / 0.9 so the C++ renderer damper begins at the intended release time
timing_policy.silence_representation: No fake rest notes. Silence is absence of events; rests[] and performance.breath_after_ms expose it explicitly.
timing_policy.articulation_policy: Notated rests are untouched. Contiguous notes receive a small bow-change gap; rapid repeated notes receive a larger detached gap.
